bead.title: Stage 4.7: Beads lifecycle subscription (live updates)
bead.description: Add beadLifecycle subscription to the Beads page. Subscription active while page open; when bead state changes externally, the row updates live without refresh. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #41.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: open Beads page in browser. (2) In another terminal, run `ddx bead claim <id>` for a bead visible in the list. (3) See the row's status flip to 'in-progress' within 2 seconds without a refresh. Record the bead ID + observed behavior in the completion note.
